sentences.sentence: It is difficult to conceive of vigorous economic growth without an efficient transport system.
sentences.translation: 很难想象，一个没有高效交通系统的社会能够实现强劲的经济增长。

structure.text: It is difficult
to conceive of vigorous economic growth
without an efficient transport system

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，真正的主语是后面的不定式 to conceive of ...。
without ... 表示设想强劲经济增长时缺少高效交通系统这一条件。

sentences.sentence: Although modern information technologies can reduce the demand for physical transport by facilitating teleworking and teleservices, the requirement for transport continues to increase.
sentences.translation: 尽管现代信息技术可以通过促进远程办公和远程服务来减少对实体运输的需求，但总体交通需求仍在持续增长。

structure.text: Although modern information technologies can reduce the demand for physical transport
by facilitating teleworking and teleservices
the requirement for transport
continues to increase

difficult_points: Although 引导让步状语从句，主句说明交通需求并未因信息技术而下降。
by facilitating ... 表示减少实体运输需求所采用的方式。

sentences.sentence: There are two key factors behind this trend.
sentences.translation: 这一趋势背后有两个关键因素。

structure.text: There are
two key factors
behind this trend

difficult_points: There are 是存在句结构，真正说明的对象是 two key factors。
this trend 回指上一句所说的交通需求持续增长。

sentences.sentence: For passenger transport, the determining factor is the spectacular growth in car use.
sentences.translation: 就客运而言，决定性因素是汽车使用量的惊人增长。

structure.text: For passenger transport
the determining factor
is the spectacular growth in car use

difficult_points: For passenger transport 限定讨论范围，意为“就客运而言”。
growth in car use 指汽车使用量的增长，而不是汽车本身尺寸的增长。

sentences.sentence: The number of cars on European Union (EU) roads saw an increase of three million cars each year from 1990 to 2010, and in the next decade the EU will see a further substantial increase in its fleet.
sentences.translation: 1990年至2010年间，欧盟道路上的汽车数量每年增加300万辆；在接下来的十年里，欧盟的汽车保有量还将大幅增长。

structure.text: The number of cars on European Union (EU) roads
saw an increase of three million cars each year
from 1990 to 2010
and in the next decade the EU will see a further substantial increase in its fleet

difficult_points: saw an increase 是非生命主语的拟人化表达，意思是“出现了增长”。
its fleet 中 fleet 指欧盟范围内的汽车保有量，而非某一支车队。

sentences.sentence: As far as goods transport is concerned, growth is due to a large extent to changes in the European economy and its system of production.
sentences.translation: 就货运而言，其增长在很大程度上源于欧洲经济及其生产体系的变化。

structure.text: As far as goods transport is concerned
growth
is due to a large extent to changes
in the European economy and its system of production

difficult_points: As far as ... is concerned 是固定结构，用于限定当前讨论的是货运。
due to a large extent to 中 to a large extent 是插入的程度状语，核心搭配是 be due to。

sentences.sentence: In the last 20 years, as internal frontiers have been abolished, the EU has moved from a 'stock' economy to a 'flow' economy.
sentences.translation: 过去20年间，随着内部边界被取消，欧盟已经从“库存型”经济转向“流动型”经济。

structure.text: In the last 20 years
as internal frontiers have been abolished
the EU
has moved from a 'stock' economy to a 'flow' economy

difficult_points: as 引导伴随变化的状语从句，表示“随着内部边界被取消”。
have been abolished 是现在完成时的被动语态，强调边界取消后产生的持续影响。

sentences.sentence: This phenomenon has been emphasised by the relocation of some industries, particularly those which are labour intensive, to reduce production costs, even though the production site is hundreds or even thousands of kilometres away from the final assembly plant or away from users.
sentences.translation: 一些产业为了降低生产成本而迁移，使这一现象更加突出，尤其是劳动密集型产业；即使生产地点距离最终装配厂或用户有数百乃至数千公里，这种迁移仍然发生。

structure.text: This phenomenon has been emphasised by the relocation of some industries
particularly those
which are labour intensive
to reduce production costs
even though the production site is hundreds or even thousands of kilometres away from the final assembly plant or away from users

difficult_points: has been emphasised 是被动语态，表示产业迁移使前述经济转型更加明显。
those 代替 some industries，which 引导的定语从句说明这类产业是劳动密集型。
to reduce ... 表示迁移的目的，even though 从句说明产业远距离迁移仍然发生。

sentences.sentence: The strong economic growth expected in countries which are candidates for entry to the EU will also increase transport flows, in particular road haulage traffic.
sentences.translation: 预计欧盟候选国将出现强劲的经济增长，这也会增加运输流量，尤其是公路货运流量。

structure.text: The strong economic growth
expected in countries
which are candidates for entry to the EU
will also increase transport flows
in particular road haulage traffic

difficult_points: expected ... 是过去分词短语，修饰 economic growth，而不是谓语。
which 引导定语从句修饰 countries，说明这些国家是欧盟候选国。
in particular 后具体指出增长最明显的是公路货运流量。

sentences.sentence: In 1998, some of these countries already exported more than twice their 1990 volumes and imported more than five times their 1990 volumes.
sentences.translation: 到1998年，其中一些国家的出口量已超过1990年的两倍，进口量则超过1990年的五倍。

structure.text: some of these countries
already exported more than twice their 1990 volumes
and imported more than five times their 1990 volumes

difficult_points: exported 和 imported 是由 and 连接、共同以 some of these countries 为主语的并列谓语。
twice their 1990 volumes 和 five times their 1990 volumes 比较的是贸易量。

sentences.sentence: And although many candidate countries inherited a transport system which encourages rail, the distribution between modes has tipped sharply in favour of road transport since the 1990s.
sentences.translation: 而且，尽管许多候选国继承了一套鼓励铁路运输的交通体系，但自20世纪90年代以来，各运输方式的占比已大幅向公路运输倾斜。

structure.text: although many candidate countries inherited a transport system
which encourages rail
the distribution between modes
has tipped sharply in favour of road transport
since the 1990s

difficult_points: although 引导让步状语从句，which 从句修饰其中的 a transport system。
has tipped 使用现在完成时，表示运输方式占比从20世纪90年代起发生并延续的变化。
in favour of 表明这种变化偏向公路运输。

expressions.meaning_zh: 各运输方式之间的占比

sentences.sentence: Between 1990 and 1998, road haulage increased by 19.4%, while during the same period rail haulage decreased by 43.5%, although – and this could benefit the enlarged EU – it is still on average at a much higher level than in existing member states.
sentences.translation: 1990年至1998年间，公路货运量增长了19.4%，同期铁路货运量下降了43.5%；不过，后者的平均水平仍远高于现有成员国，而这一点可能对扩大的欧盟有利。

structure.text: road haulage increased by 19.4%
while during the same period rail haulage decreased by 43.5%
although – and this could benefit the enlarged EU – it is still on average at a much higher level than in existing member states
and this could benefit the enlarged EU

difficult_points: while 用来对比公路货运增长与铁路货运下降两组数据。
although 从句中的 it 指 rail haulage，说明候选国铁路货运虽下降但仍高于现有成员国。
破折号中的 and this could benefit ... 是插入语，this 指较高的铁路货运水平。

expressions.text: at a much higher level than

sentences.sentence: However, a new imperative – sustainable development – offers an opportunity for adapting the EU's common transport policy.
sentences.translation: 然而，一个新的迫切要求——可持续发展——为调整欧盟共同交通政策提供了契机。

structure.text: a new imperative
sustainable development
offers an opportunity
for adapting the EU's common transport policy

difficult_points: 破折号中的 sustainable development 是 a new imperative 的同位语。
for adapting ... 说明 opportunity 的具体内容，即调整共同交通政策。

sentences.sentence: This objective, agreed by the Gothenburg European Council, has to be achieved by integrating environmental considerations into Community policies, and shifting the balance between modes of transport lies at the heart of its strategy.
sentences.translation: 这一目标经哥德堡欧洲理事会通过，必须通过把环境因素纳入欧共体政策来实现；而调整各种运输方式之间的平衡，正是该战略的核心。

structure.text: This objective
agreed by the Gothenburg European Council
has to be achieved
by integrating environmental considerations into Community policies
and shifting the balance between modes of transport lies at the heart of its strategy

difficult_points: agreed ... 是过去分词短语，补充说明 This objective 已获理事会同意。
by integrating ... 表示实现目标的方式，其中 integrate A into B 意为把 A 纳入 B。
第二个并列分句以动名词短语 shifting the balance ... 作主语。

sentences.sentence: The ambitious objective can only be fully achieved by 2020, but proposed measures are nonetheless a first essential step towards a sustainable transport system which will ideally be in place in 30 years' time, that is by 2040.
sentences.translation: 这一宏伟目标最早要到2020年才能全面实现，但拟议的措施仍是迈向可持续交通系统至关重要的第一步；理想情况下，该系统将在30年后，也就是2040年建成。

structure.text: The ambitious objective can only be fully achieved by 2020
but proposed measures are nonetheless a first essential step towards a sustainable transport system
which will ideally be in place in 30 years' time
that is by 2040

difficult_points: but 连接“目标实现较晚”与“措施仍是第一步”两个转折分句。
which 引导定语从句修饰 a sustainable transport system。
that is 用于重述并明确 in 30 years' time 所对应的年份。

expressions.meaning_zh: 迈向……至关重要的第一步

sentences.sentence: In 1998, energy consumption in the transport sector was to blame for 28% of emissions of CO2, the leading greenhouse gas.
sentences.translation: 1998年，交通运输部门的能源消耗造成了28%的二氧化碳排放，而二氧化碳是主要的温室气体。

structure.text: energy consumption in the transport sector
was to blame for 28% of emissions of CO2
the leading greenhouse gas

difficult_points: be to blame for 表示“是造成……的原因”，并非字面上的“将被责备”。
the leading greenhouse gas 是 CO2 的同位语。

sentences.sentence: According to the latest estimates, if nothing is done to reverse the traffic growth trend, CO2 emissions from transport can be expected to increase by around 50% to 1,113 billion tonnes by 2020, compared with the 739 billion tonnes recorded in 1990.
sentences.translation: 根据最新估算，如果不采取措施扭转交通增长趋势，到2020年，交通运输产生的二氧化碳排放量预计将增长约50%，达到1.113万亿吨；1990年的记录则为7390亿吨。

structure.text: According to the latest estimates
if nothing is done to reverse the traffic growth trend
CO2 emissions from transport can be expected to increase by around 50% to 1,113 billion tonnes by 2020
compared with the 739 billion tonnes recorded in 1990

difficult_points: if 从句使用被动语态，nothing is done 表示“不采取任何行动”。
increase by around 50% 表示增幅，to 1,113 billion tonnes 表示增长后的总量。
compared with ... 是过去分词短语，其中 recorded in 1990 修饰 739 billion tonnes。

sentences.sentence: Once again, road transport is the main culprit since it alone accounts for 84% of the CO2 emissions attributable to transport.
sentences.translation: 公路运输再次成为罪魁祸首，因为仅它一项就占交通运输相关二氧化碳排放量的84%。

structure.text: road transport is the main culprit
since it alone accounts for 84% of the CO2 emissions
attributable to transport

difficult_points: since 在这里引导原因状语从句，意为“因为”，而不是“自从”。
it 指 road transport，alone 强调仅公路运输一项所占比例就很高。
attributable to transport 是形容词短语，后置修饰 CO2 emissions。

sentences.sentence: Using alternative fuels and improving energy efficiency is thus both an ecological necessity and a technological challenge.
sentences.translation: 因此，使用替代燃料并提高能源效率，既是生态上的必要举措，也是技术上的挑战。

structure.text: Using alternative fuels and improving energy efficiency
is
both an ecological necessity and a technological challenge

difficult_points: Using ... and improving ... 是两个并列动名词短语，共同作为主语。
both ... and ... 连接两个并列表语，强调这一行动同时具有必要性和挑战性。

sentences.sentence: At the same time greater efforts must be made to achieve a modal shift.
sentences.translation: 与此同时，必须付出更大努力来推动运输方式的转变。

structure.text: At the same time
greater efforts must be made
to achieve a modal shift

difficult_points: must be made 是被动语态，make efforts 表示“付出努力”。
to achieve ... 是目的状语，modal shift 指不同运输方式之间的转移。

sentences.sentence: Such a change cannot be achieved overnight, all the less so after over half a century of constant deterioration in favour of road.
sentences.translation: 这样的转变不可能一蹴而就；尤其是在经历了半个多世纪持续向公路运输倾斜的恶化之后，更是如此。

structure.text: Such a change cannot be achieved overnight
all the less so
after over half a century of constant deterioration in favour of road

difficult_points: cannot be achieved 是被动语态，overnight 比喻“在短时间内、一蹴而就”。
all the less so 表示“就更不可能如此”，so 代替前面的 be achieved overnight。
in favour of road 表示长期变化持续偏向公路运输。

sentences.sentence: This has reached such a pitch that today rail freight services are facing marginalisation, with just 8% of market share, and with international goods trains struggling along at an average speed of 18km/h.
sentences.translation: 这种局面已经严重到如此程度：如今铁路货运服务正面临被边缘化，市场份额仅为8%，国际货运列车的平均时速也只有18公里。

structure.text: This has reached such a pitch
that today rail freight services are facing marginalisation
with just 8% of market share
and with international goods trains struggling along at an average speed of 18km/h

difficult_points: such ... that ... 是结果结构，表示偏向公路的局面严重到铁路被边缘化。
两个 with 短语补充说明铁路货运被边缘化的具体表现。
international goods trains struggling ... 是 with 复合结构，struggling 描述列车艰难缓慢运行。

expressions.meaning_zh: 达到如此严重的程度，以至于

sentences.sentence: Three possible options have emerged.
sentences.translation: 目前出现了三种可行的方案。

structure.text: Three possible options
have emerged

difficult_points: have emerged 使用现在完成时，表示这些方案已在当前讨论中形成。
options 指下文将逐一说明的三种交通政策方案。

sentences.sentence: The first approach would consist of focusing on road transport solely through pricing.
sentences.translation: 第一种方案是只通过定价手段来重点调控公路运输。

structure.text: The first approach
would consist of
focusing on road transport solely through pricing

difficult_points: consist of 后接动名词 focusing，说明第一种方案的具体内容。
solely through pricing 表示只使用价格这一种调控手段。

sentences.sentence: This option would not be accompanied by complementary measures in the other modes of transport.
sentences.translation: 这一方案不会辅以针对其他运输方式的配套措施。

structure.text: This option
would not be accompanied by
complementary measures
in the other modes of transport

difficult_points: would not be accompanied by 是被动结构，表示该方案不配合其他措施。
complementary measures 指与公路定价政策相配套、作用于其他运输方式的措施。

sentences.sentence: In the short term it might curb the growth in road transport through the better loading ratio of goods vehicles and occupancy rates of passenger vehicles expected as a result of the increase in the price of transport.
sentences.translation: 短期内，运输价格上涨预计会提高货车的装载率和客车的乘坐率，从而可能抑制公路运输的增长。

structure.text: In the short term
it might curb the growth in road transport
through the better loading ratio of goods vehicles and occupancy rates of passenger vehicles
expected as a result of the increase in the price of transport

difficult_points: it 指前文第一种定价方案，curb 表示抑制而非彻底停止增长。
through ... 表示抑制增长的途径是提高车辆装载率和乘坐率。
expected ... 是过去分词短语，修饰 better loading ratio 和 occupancy rates。

sentences.sentence: However, the lack of measures available to revitalise other modes of transport would make it impossible for more sustainable modes of transport to take up the baton.
sentences.translation: 然而，由于缺乏能够振兴其他运输方式的措施，更可持续的运输方式将无法接过重任。

structure.text: the lack of measures
available to revitalise other modes of transport
would make it impossible
for more sustainable modes of transport to take up the baton

difficult_points: available to ... 是形容词短语，后置修饰 measures，说明这些措施应能振兴其他运输方式。
make it impossible for ... to ... 中 it 是形式宾语，真正内容是后面的不定式结构。
take up the baton 原指接过接力棒，此处比喻其他运输方式接替公路运输的作用。

sentences.sentence: The second approach also concentrates on road transport pricing but is accompanied by measures to increase the efficiency of the other modes (better quality of services, logistics, technology).
sentences.translation: 第二种方案也侧重公路运输定价，但同时配套采取措施，提高其他运输方式的效率，例如改善服务质量、物流和技术。

structure.text: The second approach
also concentrates on road transport pricing
but is accompanied by measures
to increase the efficiency of the other modes
better quality of services, logistics, technology

difficult_points: concentrates 和 is accompanied 是以 The second approach 为共同主语的并列谓语。
to increase ... 说明 measures 的目的。
括号中的内容列举提高其他运输方式效率所涉及的方面。

sentences.sentence: However, this approach does not include investment in new infrastructure, nor does it guarantee better regional cohesion.
sentences.translation: 然而，这一方案不包括对新基础设施的投资，也不能保证实现更好的区域协调发展。

structure.text: this approach does not include investment in new infrastructure
nor does it guarantee better regional cohesion

difficult_points: nor 连接第二个否定分句，并引起助动词 does 与主语 it 的部分倒装。
it 指 this approach；regional cohesion 指不同地区之间的协调和凝聚。

sentences.sentence: It could help to achieve greater uncoupling than the first approach, but road transport would keep the lion's share of the market and continue to concentrate on saturated arteries, despite being the most polluting of the modes.
sentences.translation: 与第一种方案相比，它或许能使交通增长与经济增长实现更大程度的脱钩，但公路运输仍会占据最大的市场份额，并继续集中在饱和的交通干线上，尽管它是污染最严重的运输方式。

structure.text: It could help to achieve greater uncoupling than the first approach
but road transport would keep the lion's share of the market
and continue to concentrate on saturated arteries
despite being the most polluting of the modes

difficult_points: It 指第二种方案，uncoupling 指交通增长与经济增长之间的脱钩。
keep 和 continue 是以 road transport 为主语的并列谓语。
despite 后接动名词 being，逻辑主语仍是 road transport。

expressions.meaning_zh: 集中在饱和的交通干线上

sentences.sentence: It is therefore not enough to guarantee the necessary shift of the balance.
sentences.translation: 因此，它不足以保证实现必要的运输方式平衡转移。

structure.text: It
is therefore not enough
to guarantee the necessary shift of the balance

difficult_points: It 回指前文所述的第二种政策方案。
to guarantee ... 补充说明 not enough 的具体方面，即不足以保证平衡发生必要转移。

sentences.sentence: The third approach, which is not new, comprises a series of measures ranging from pricing to revitalising alternative modes of transport and targeting investment in the trans-European network.
sentences.translation: 第三种方案并非新方案，它包括一系列措施，从定价、振兴替代运输方式，到把投资投向泛欧交通网络。

structure.text: The third approach
which is not new
comprises a series of measures
ranging from pricing to revitalising alternative modes of transport and targeting investment in the trans-European network

difficult_points: which is not new 是非限制性定语从句，补充说明第三种方案。
ranging ... 是现在分词短语修饰 measures，from ... to ... 表示措施范围。
revitalising 和 targeting 是 to 后并列的两个动名词。

sentences.sentence: This integrated approach would allow the market shares of the other modes to return to their 1998 levels and thus make a shift of balance.
sentences.translation: 这一综合方案将使其他运输方式的市场份额恢复到1998年的水平，从而推动运输方式之间的平衡转移。

structure.text: This integrated approach
would allow
the market shares of the other modes to return to their 1998 levels
and thus make a shift of balance

difficult_points: allow A to do B 表示使 A 能够做 B，这里 A 是其他运输方式的市场份额。
their 指 the other modes，return to ... levels 表示恢复到过去水平。
thus 表示结果，说明市场份额恢复将促成平衡转移。

sentences.sentence: It is far more ambitious than it looks, bearing in mind the historical imbalance in favour of roads for the last fifty years, but would achieve a market break in the link between road transport growth and economic growth, without placing restrictions on the mobility of people and goods.
sentences.translation: 考虑到过去五十年来交通体系一直失衡并偏向公路运输，这一方案远比表面看上去更有雄心；而且它能在不限制人员和货物流动的情况下，通过市场手段打破公路运输增长与经济增长之间的联系。

structure.text: It is far more ambitious than it looks
bearing in mind the historical imbalance in favour of roads for the last fifty years
but would achieve a market break in the link between road transport growth and economic growth
without placing restrictions on the mobility of people and goods

difficult_points: 两个 it 都指第三种综合方案，than it looks 表示“比它表面看起来更……”。
bearing in mind ... 是现在分词短语，表示评估该方案雄心时需要考虑的背景。
but 后省略主语 it；without placing ... 说明实现脱钩不会以限制流动为代价。

expressions.text: the mobility of people and goods
